message:
refactor(playbook): Major restructure for clarity and reliability

Comprehensive playbook module update:

## Core Functions
- loadPlaybook(): Enhanced error handling with backup creation
- savePlaybook(): Atomic writes with temp file pattern
- loadMergedPlaybook(): Cascaded loading with toxic filtering

## Bullet Management
- addBullet(): Full implementation with agent extraction
- deprecateBullet(): Complete deprecation workflow
- findBullet(): O(1) lookup helper
- getActiveBullets(): Filter active bullets only
- getBulletsByCategory(): Category-based filtering

## Toxic Content Handling
- loadToxicLog(): Parses JSONL toxic log files
- isSemanticallyToxic(): Jaccard similarity + hash matching
- Filters merged playbook against global and repo toxic logs

## Schema Validation
- Uses PlaybookSchema from types.ts
- Validates on load with graceful fallback
- Creates backup before overwriting invalid files

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
